rationale: The cited paper is not just listed in passing; it is included in a focused discussion of prior automobile information-search research that the authors say informed their survey design. The citing paper then explicitly positions its contribution as a substantial extension of this prior stream by combining survey search measures with transaction-level purchase outcomes. Although the citation appears in a grouped set, its functional role in framing and positioning the new contribution is clear.
relation_description: The citing paper builds on prior Internet-related automobile search research, including Ratchford, Talukdar, and Lee (2003), and extends that line by linking search behavior measures to actual negotiated transaction prices. In doing so, it moves from documenting search behavior changes to explaining price-outcome effects.
